metadata.description: Phase 5 runtime validation with replayable surrogates, truncation convergence, and noisy replay.

pulse_metadata.mapping: Rotating-frame controls exported as square-envelope pulses on the propagation grid. For repository drive targets, I/Q quadratures are combined into the complex channel coefficient c(t) = I(t) - i Q(t), which matches cqed_sim.sim.runner Hamiltonian assembly.
